positive: A sophisticated, highly detailed celestial botanical mandala. The design features intertwined elements of crescent moons, stylized constellations, and lush exotic flora (peonies, lilies, ferns). Use an Art Nouveau and symmetrical geometric illustration style. Strong central composition with balanced symmetry, isolated on a solid deep midnight blue background. Color palette: cosmic indigo, matte gold, and emerald green. Perfect vector quality, thick outlines, high contrast, clean silhouettes, printable artwork, isolated subject, highly detailed, complex motif, symmetrical pattern.
